# PravaraMES

> Cloud-native Manufacturing Execution System for phygital fabrication workflows

PravaraMES is MADFAM's next-generation MES built on a Unified Namespace (UNS) architecture, replacing traditional ISA-95 hierarchical systems with a real-time, event-driven platform.

## Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        PravaraMES                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  pravara-ui (Next.js 15)     │  Real-time dashboard            │
│  Port: 4501                  │  React 19, Tailwind, Radix UI   │
├──────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────┤
│  pravara-api (Go/Gin)        │  REST API + WebSocket auth      │
│  Port: 4500                  │  PostgreSQL, Redis, OIDC        │
├──────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────┤
│  pravara-gateway (Centrifugo)│  WebSocket multiplexing         │
│  Port: 8000                  │  Real-time event broadcasting   │
├──────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────┤
│  telemetry-worker (Go)       │  MQTT telemetry processor       │
│  Port: 4502                  │  EMQX integration, batch insert │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Key Patterns

### Multi-Tenancy
- Pooled model with PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS)
- Tenant ID extracted from JWT claims via Janua SSO
- All database queries automatically scoped to tenant

### Event-Driven Architecture
- Redis Pub/Sub for internal events
- Centrifugo for WebSocket broadcasting to UI
- MQTT (EMQX) for machine telemetry ingestion

### Repository Pattern
- All database access through repository interfaces
- Handlers never access DB directly
- Promotes testability and separation of concerns

### React Query + Zustand
- React Query for server state (API data)
- Zustand for client state (UI state)
- Real-time updates via WebSocket hooks

## Directory Structure

```
pravara-mes/
├── apps/
│   ├── pravara-api/          # Go REST API
│   │   ├── cmd/api/main.go   # Entry point
│   │   └── internal/
│   │       ├── api/          # HTTP handlers
│   │       ├── auth/         # OIDC verification
│   │       ├── db/           # Repositories + migrations
│   │       ├── middleware/   # Auth, rate-limit, metrics
│   │       ├── pubsub/       # Redis event publishing
│   │       ├── services/     # Business logic
│   │       └── billing/      # Usage tracking
│   ├── pravara-ui/           # Next.js dashboard
│   │   ├── app/              # App Router pages
│   │   ├── components/       # React components
│   │   ├── hooks/            # Custom hooks
│   │   └── lib/              # API client, realtime
│   ├── telemetry-worker/     # MQTT processor
│   │   ├── cmd/worker/       # Entry point
│   │   └── internal/
│   │       ├── mqtt/         # MQTT handler
│   │       ├── db/           # Telemetry storage
│   │       └── command/      # Machine commands
│   └── pravara-gateway/      # Centrifugo config
├── packages/
│   └── sdk-go/               # Shared Go types
├── infra/k8s/                # Kubernetes manifests
└── docs/                     # Generated documentation
```

## Core Entities

| Entity | Description | Key Fields |
|--------|-------------|------------|
| **Order** | Manufacturing order | status, priority, due_date, total_amount |
| **Task** | Kanban work item | status, machine_id, kanban_position |
| **Machine** | Equipment registry | status, mqtt_topic, capabilities |
| **Telemetry** | Time-series data | timestamp, metric_type, value, unit |
| **QualityCertificate** | COC/COA documents | type, status, document_url |

## API Endpoints

### Health
- `GET /health` - Full health check
- `GET /health/live` - Liveness probe
- `GET /health/ready` - Readiness probe

### Orders
- `GET /v1/orders` - List orders
- `POST /v1/orders` - Create order
- `GET /v1/orders/:id` - Get order
- `PUT /v1/orders/:id` - Update order
- `DELETE /v1/orders/:id` - Delete order

### Tasks (Kanban)
- `GET /v1/tasks` - List tasks
- `POST /v1/tasks` - Create task
- `GET /v1/tasks/board` - Get Kanban board
- `PATCH /v1/tasks/:id/move` - Move task
- `PATCH /v1/tasks/:id/assign` - Assign task

### Machines
- `GET /v1/machines` - List machines
- `POST /v1/machines` - Create machine
- `POST /v1/machines/:id/command` - Send command
- `GET /v1/machines/:id/telemetry` - Get telemetry

### Quality
- `GET /v1/quality/certificates` - List certificates
- `POST /v1/quality/inspections` - Create inspection
- `GET /v1/quality/batches` - List batch lots

## WebSocket Channels (Centrifugo)

| Channel Pattern | Events |
|-----------------|--------|
| `machines:{tenant_id}` | Machine status, heartbeat |
| `tasks:{tenant_id}` | Task movements, assignments |
| `orders:{tenant_id}` | Order status changes |
| `telemetry:{tenant_id}` | Live telemetry batches |

## MQTT Topics (UNS Pattern)

```
{tenant}/{site}/{area}/{line}/{machine}/{metric}
```

Example: `madfam/hq/fab/line1/printer-001/temperature`

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md) - Full project overview
- [PRD.md](PRD.md) - Product requirements
- [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md) - Development phases
- [docs/openapi.yaml](docs/openapi.yaml) - OpenAPI specification

## Entry Points for Development

### Backend API
```bash
cd apps/pravara-api
go run cmd/api/main.go
```

### Frontend UI
```bash
cd apps/pravara-ui
pnpm dev
```

### Telemetry Worker
```bash
cd apps/telemetry-worker
go run cmd/worker/main.go
```

## Environment Variables

See `.env.example` for required configuration:
- `DATABASE_URL` - PostgreSQL connection
- `REDIS_URL` - Redis connection
- `OIDC_ISSUER_URL` - Janua SSO issuer
- `MQTT_BROKER_URL` - EMQX broker
- `CENTRIFUGO_API_URL` - Centrifugo API

## Testing

```bash
# Go tests
go test ./apps/pravara-api/...
go test ./apps/telemetry-worker/...

# TypeScript type check
cd apps/pravara-ui && pnpm typecheck
```

## Deployment

- GitOps via enclii platform
- Kubernetes on Hetzner k3s cluster
- Container registry: GitHub Container Registry (GHCR)
